Bash(python -c "import tkinter; root=tkinter.Tk\(\); from isis_attack.gui.app import ISISAttackApp; app=ISISAttackApp\(root\); app._on_attack_select\('route-inject'\); vals=app.form.get_values\(\); assert 'iface' in vals and 'metric' in vals; app._on_attack_select\('iih-inject'\); vals2=app.form.get_values\(\); assert 'metric' not in vals2 and 'priority' in vals2; print\('GUI test OK'\); root.destroy\(\)")

Bash(python -c "import tkinter; root=tkinter.Tk\(\); from isis_attack.gui.app import ISISAttackApp; app=ISISAttackApp\(root\); app._on_attack_select\('route-inject'\); vals=app.form.get_values\(\); assert 'metric' in vals; app._on_attack_select\('iih-inject'\); vals2=app.form.get_values\(\); assert 'priority' in vals2; assert 'metric' not in vals2; print\('GUI test OK'\); root.destroy\(\)")
